title: Handle wallet-authenticated session in /auth/callback
description: Ensure /auth/callback correctly handles sessions established via the SIWE flow. The wallet user should receive the same post-auth routing as email users.
acceptance_criteria: A wallet user who completes SIWE and is redirected to the action_link lands on /auth/callback
The existing onAuthStateChange handler in TASK-017 picks up the SIGNED_IN event
handlePostAuth() is called and routes the wallet user correctly (onboarding or dashboard)
No special casing for wallet vs email users in the callback handler
Wallet user's profile row exists (created by on_auth_user_created trigger) with wallet_address populated

steps.description: Verify no code changes needed to auth-callback.html
steps.details: The callback page already handles onAuthStateChange generically. Load /auth/callback after a SIWE verify flow and confirm the session is detected and routing occurs. If the profile lacks wallet_address (because the trigger didn't set it), add a one-time update: supabase.from('profiles').update({ wallet_address: session.user.email.replace('@wallet.flatfinder.app','') }).eq('id', session.user.id)

steps.description: Test full wallet sign-in flow end to end
steps.details: 1. Open /signup. 2. Click Connect Wallet. 3. Connect MetaMask. 4. Sign the SIWE message. 5. Confirm redirect to /onboarding/role. 6. Select role, complete onboarding. 7. Log out. 8. Open /login, Connect Wallet again. 9. Confirm redirect to /search or /listings (skipping onboarding).
